name: Creamy Crab Soup
recipeIngredient: ½ cup Bick's Tangy Dill Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spinach in chicken broth until tender.
2. In a large saucepan, sauté onion in butter until tender.
3. Add flour and seasonings to the onion mixture; stir until smooth.
4. Stir in the cooked spinach mixture into the saucepan.
5. Continue cooking, stirring constantly, until the mixture just comes to a boil and thickens.
6. Stir in cream, crabmeat, and relish.
7. Heat through gently; do not boil.
Note: This soup freezes well. Reheat slowly, ensuring it does not boil. It is also enjoyable with a can of crab meat or small shrimp.
